creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
On Site is new Source release 1.0.4-0 for editors/lazarus

http://www.lazarus.freepascal.org/

The Lazarus team is glad to announce the release of Lazarus 1.0.4.

This is a bug fix release. Here is the list of changes:
http://wiki.lazarus.freepascal.org/Lazarus_1.0_fixes_branch#Fixes_for_1.0.4_.28Merged.29


And here is Source Release 1.0.4-0 on SourceForge

http://sourceforge.net/projects/lazarus/files/Lazarus%20Zip%20_%20GZip/Lazarus%201.0.4/lazarus-1.0.4-0.tar.gz


Please update this Port which is now Beta Version 0.9.30.4 to bugfix release 1.0.4-0.

How-To-Repeat: Please update the obsolete, beta version to the latest release, bugfix version.
